content: Backend: graamam_orders.py use shared helpers + duplicate-key retry safety
Backfill: fix existing duplicate ORD-2627-0004, verify zero dupes
Backend: graamam_warehouse.py rekey ready/raise-production on wh_token
Backend: graamam_extras.py fix GST intra/inter (state_code), atomic invoice numbering, B2B/POS series + doc_label
Backend: graamam_dispatch.py new queue enrichment + dispatch action (verify/deduct/dispatch/auto-invoice) + dispatched list
Backend: server.py call ensure_unique_indexes at startup
Frontend: firestoreClient.js warehouseRepository rekey + dispatchRepository new methods
Frontend: WarehousePage.jsx pass wh_token to actions
Frontend: rewrite DispatchPage.jsx (Ready for Dispatch cards, Dispatched table)
Frontend: new DispatchFormPrintPage.jsx (A5 label, no phone numbers)
Frontend: InvoicePrintPage.jsx use doc_label; DataTable.jsx remove Raise Invoice button
Frontend: App.js route + testIds for dispatch form page
Bugfix found in self-check: Order model missing dispatched_by/dispatched_at fields (response_model stripped them)
Self-check: lint, restart, curl full pipeline (create->warehouse->dispatch->invoice GST both cases)
